_publications._publicationTitle: Merlin is a potent inhibitor of glioma growth.

_contextSnippet: Transduced U87MG and U251 cells were used for subcutaneous tumor growth experiments to assess the effect of merlin and merlin mutants on tumor growth in vivo
details: Used for subcutaneous and intracranial tumor growth experiments with U87MG and U251 glioma cells; merlin overexpression dramatically inhibited tumor growth
